nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines Nuxt-specific coding style rules covering directory layout, auto-import discipline, Vue compiler macros, config file separation, and head/meta management with useHead.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Specifies Claude Code hook configurations for Nuxt projects, defining PostToolUse chains for type-checking, linting, and formatting using vue-tsc, ESLint, and Prettier.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents recommended Nuxt architectural patterns including data-fetch composable selection, shared state with useState/Pinia, Nitro server routes, route middleware, and hydration-safe rendering strategies.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Enumerates Nuxt-specific security pitfalls and mitigations covering runtimeConfig public/private separation, server-route input validation, SSR payload leakage prevention, cookie passthrough on SSR, and SSRF on server-side $fetch.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Describes Nuxt testing conventions using @nuxt/test-utils and Vitest, covering setup, runtime helpers, E2E helpers with renderSuspended/mountSuspended, and guidance on what testing approach to apply per scenario.
